caption: The video features two birds perched on a white surface, likely a ledge or railing, against a blurred green background that suggests a natural outdoor setting. The bird on the left has a brownish body with black and white markings on its wings and tail, while the bird on the right has a more vibrant appearance with orange and black plumage. Throughout the video, the bird on the left appears to be vocalizing, as indicated by its open beak and the movement of its head. The text overlay in Marathi reads "चिव चिव चिमणी" at the top and "मराठी बालगीत" at the bottom, which translates to "Chiv Chiv Chimani" and "Marathi Children's Song," respectively. This suggests that the video is likely part of a children's song or educational content featuring the sounds and behaviors of these birds.
